publication.scope: Every reviewed foreign-name pair and source match count from the public source file.
publication.access: Static JSON chunks retain the source's left and parenthesized strings without normalizing their direction.

provenance.citation: Foreign-name transliteration data. 2025. CLARIN-LT Repository. https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.11821/68.

constraints: Expose the two source strings as left and parenthesized fields; do not silently infer a canonical foreign or Lithuanian ordering.
Treat sourceMatchCount as an extraction match count, not as a general Lithuanian-language frequency.
Retain the source record order and its documented noise or non-standard transliterations.

views.title: Foreign-name transliteration source pairs
views.description: Every source-provided pair, kept in source order; sourceMatchCount is not a general word-frequency measure.
